logistics.explanation: Expo and packet pickup run efficiently from 10:00-19:00 on Friday and Saturday at Place des drapeaux in Orcieres-Merlette. Neutralized peloton start from Orcières Merlette 1850 eases into the Ancelle climb. Bike service available race morning from 7:00-7:45.

length.explanation: Full course spans 158 km from Orcieres-Merlette through Chorges and Saint-Apollinaire to Lake Serre-Ponçon. Includes a 25 km loop on Embrun triathlon roads near Écrins National Park. Medium option at 75 km offers shorter challenge with Chaillol climb.

technicality.explanation: Paved roads feature steep passages on the 25 km Embrun loop and technical 7 km climb to Orcières at 7% gradient. Route demands precise pacing on high mountain cols. No gravel, all on well-known Tour de France paths.

elevation.explanation: 4400 meters gain over 158 km includes Ancelle, Chaillol, and Orcières Merlette 1850 via Serre Eyraud climbs. Massive vertical near Ecrins National Park gates. Finishes with sporty return to 1850m altitude base.

climate.explanation: Exceptional Hautes-Alpes conditions in Champsaur valley provide sunny, favorable weather. August timing avoids extremes near Lake Serre-Ponçon. Resort's 2725m ski area history suggests reliable high-altitude cycling climate.

altitude.explanation: Starts at Orcières Merlette 1850 station, tackling cols up to 2725m potential. High mountain passes at Écrins National Park borders demand acclimation. Technical Orcières climb ends at 1850m finish.

adventure.explanation: Traverses breathtaking Hautes-Alpes landscapes to Europe's largest artificial lake at Serre-Ponçon. Passes high cols near Écrins National Park with Tour de France heritage. 25 km Embrun loop adds iconic steep challenges.

prestige.explanation: GFNY Orcieres leverages Orcières-Merlette's five Tour de France arrivals, including Luis Ocaña's 1971 win over Eddy Merckx. Greg LeMond's 1989 yellow jersey takeover adds legacy. Part of global GFNY series since 2019.

race_quality.explanation: Chip timing from start line post-neutralized peloton, results at gfny.cc/results. Official NYC-designed Italian jersey mandatory. Regional Hautes-Alpes event with pro-level organization.

experience.explanation: Panoramas of Écrins National Park and Lake Serre-Ponçon stun riders via Chorges. Historical climbs like 7km Orcières at 7% test all levels. Post-race meal from 10:00 and awards at 13:30 cap festivities.

community.explanation: Orcières Cycling Festival features group rides, welcome apéritif, and opening concert at Bowling du Palais des Sports. GFNY Camp from Sunday draws enthusiasts. 1200 capacity fosters tight-knit peloton vibe.

field_depth.explanation: Typical 1200 participants fill corrals closing at 7:45 for 8:00 start. Podium chasers and qualifiers mix with finishers. Alphabetical medium course listing emphasizes inclusive field.

value.explanation: GFNY jersey, chip timing, and festival expo included for regional Alps spectacle. Massive 4400m climbing near Écrins at accessible entry. Personalized coaching plans enhance prep value.

expenses.explanation: Hautes-Alpes resort travel to Orcières-Merlette requires planning, with expo arrival by 11am Saturday. Accommodation in ski station area adds cost. Festival activities offset with free group rides.

cultural_impact.explanation: Regional draw in Champsaur valley taps Tour history at Orcières. Écrins proximity boosts local cycling culture. GFNY branding elevates Hautes-Alpes gran fondo scene.

course_description.summary: GFNY Orcieres delivers 158 km of Southern French Alps suffering starting from Orcières Merlette 1850 with 4400m elevation gain. Riders tackle Ancelle climb first, then loop Lake Serre-Ponçon via Chorges and Saint-Apollinaire amid Écrins National Park views. Steep Embrun triathlon roads and historic Orcières return cap the massive high-col challenge.

key_segments.name: Climb to Ancelle
key_segments.description: First major challenge after neutralized peloton from Orcières Merlette 1850.

key_segments.name: Lake Serre-Ponçon Loop
key_segments.description: 25 km on Embrun triathlon and Tour de France roads via Chorges and Saint-Apollinaire.

key_segments.name: Chaillol Climb
key_segments.description: Long ascent in Hautes-Alpes heart before final push.

key_segments.name: Orcières Merlette 1850 Finish
key_segments.description: Technical 7 km at 7% gradient via Serre Eyraud.

course_description.elevation_profile: Progressive climbs building to 4400m total: early Ancelle kickoff, mid-race Serre-Ponçon undulations, late Chaillol grind, explosive Orcières finale at 1850m.
course_description.aid_stations: Multiple along 158 km route per race guide; post-race meal opens at 10:00 at Place des drapeaux.

travel.bike_transport: Mechanical support at expo; group rides for shakedown

race_day.categories: Full competitive with podiums; medium non-competitive alphabetical
race_day.awards: 13:30 ceremony for top finishers and age group qualifiers

training_recommendations.minimum_fitness: Base of 3000m climbing per long ride; 200+ km weeks.
training_recommendations.ideal_preparation: 6-12 weeks building to 4400m vert days mimicking Ancelle and Orcières efforts.
training_recommendations.key_workouts: 7km threshold climbs at 7%; 4-hour rides with 25km undulating loops; high-altitude simulations near 2000m.

history.notable_facts: Orcières-Merlette hosted 5 Tour de France finishes: 1971 Ocaña victory over Merckx by 9 minutes; 1989 LeMond yellow jersey from Fignon. GFNY taps this legacy in Champsaur valley near Écrins.

final_verdict.one_liner: Alpine beast with Tour pedigree and Écrins majesty.
final_verdict.who_should_ride: Climbing enthusiasts seeking 4400m Haute-Alpes pain with historic cols.
final_verdict.who_should_skip: Flatland sprinters or those unready for 7km Orcières grind.
final_verdict.insider_tip: Arrive Friday for expo and road-closed cyclist parade from Orcières Village to Merlette.

suffering_zones.label: Ancelle Kickoff
suffering_zones.description: Early leg-burner post-neutralized start rips calves before Serre-Ponçon vistas.

suffering_zones.label: Embrun Steeps
suffering_zones.description: 25 km loop's brutal pitches beside Lake Serre-Ponçon test pacing amid Tour ghosts.

suffering_zones.label: Chaillol Slog
suffering_zones.description: Long, grinding mid-race col drains energy in Hautes-Alpes isolation.

suffering_zones.label: Orcières Wall
suffering_zones.description: 7km at 7% via Serre Eyraud: technical Tour legend crushes souls to 1850m glory.
